home.title: SUP Surf Georgia | Premium SUP & Surfboard Rentals & Sales
home.description: Experience Stand-Up Paddle boarding & surfing in Georgia! Rent high-quality SUP boards, surfboards, and marine equipment. Professional tours, lessons, and top gear sales.

rent.title: SUP Board & Surfboard Rentals | Rental Catalog
rent.description: Rent SUP boards, surfboards, and wingfoils by the hour or day in Georgia. Select from top locations including Lisi Lake, Batumi, and Anaklia.

shop.title: Buy SUP Boards & Surf Gear | Watersports Shop
shop.description: Shop new and premium used SUP boards, leashes, paddles, life vests, and accessories in Georgia. Top brands, expert advice.

services.title: SUP Tours, Surf Lessons & Events in Georgia
services.description: Join our guided SUP tours, beginner-friendly surfing lessons, and corporate water sports events. Fully certified instructors.

blog.title: Water Sports & SUP Blog | Safety Guides & Tips
blog.description: Read safety guidelines, water sports destinations reviews, Stand-Up Paddle boarding tips, and explore Georgia's best lakes and coasts.

contact.title: Contact Us | SUP Rent Batumi, Tbilisi, Anaklia
contact.description: Get in touch with SUP Surf Georgia. Rent boards, book tours, or inquire about sales. View locations and contact numbers.

hero.title: SUP Board Rental
hero.subtitle: Rent premium paddleboards at Lisi Lake, Batumi, and Anaklia at the best price.

services.title: Our Marine Equipment & Packages
services.subtitle: Whether you are looking to rent for a day or buy your own gear, we have you covered with the finest water sports equipment.
services.sup_desc: Top-tier inflatable and rigid stand up paddle boarding gear. Perfect for calm lakes or coastal cruising.
services.surf_desc: High-performance longboards, shortboards, and soft-tops for beginners and professional riders alike.
services.wingfoil_desc: Experience the thrill of flying above water with our state-of-the-art wingfoil rental packages.
services.lessons_desc: Learn stand up paddle boarding or surfing from certified instructors. Individual and group sessions available.

testimonials.title: What Our Riders Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from active water sports enthusiasts, tourists, and regular rental clients across Georgia.

booking.title: Book Your Equipment
booking.subtitle: Fill out the inquiry form below to check availability and reserve your board. No upfront payment required.

board_options.accessories: Premium Safety Kit (Vest, Leash, Dry Bag)

booking.pricing_note: Special Promo: 1 Day = 50 GEL, 2 Days = 80 GEL (includes full kit).
booking.success_desc: We have received your water sports rental request. A representative will contact you via phone or email within 30 minutes to confirm availability.

errors.name: Full name is required (min 3 characters).
errors.email: Please provide a valid email address.

blog_posts.title: Top 5 Safety Rules for Stand-Up Paddle Boarding in Georgia
blog_posts.excerpt: Paddleboarding is an amazing active recreation. However, water safety is paramount. Discover our essential checklist including life vests, leashes, wind speeds, and lake conditions.
blog_posts.author: George Kopadze (Head Coach)

blog_posts.title: Exploring Lisi Lake: The Ultimate Tbilisi SUP Escape
blog_posts.excerpt: Need a quick break from the Tbilisi summer heat? Lisi Lake offers the perfect calm-water destination for stand up paddle boarding. Learn about rentals, optimal boarding hours, and more.
blog_posts.author: Salome K. (Water Travel Blogger)

blog_posts.title: Batumi Surf Guide: Best Wave Conditions for Beginners
blog_posts.excerpt: Georgia is starting to ride waves! In this post, we analyze swell sizes, tidal behaviors, and the best beach sections near Batumi Miracle Beach for first-time surfboard riders.
blog_posts.author: Levon Davis (Surf Instructor)

shop_products.name: Gladiator Pro 10'6" Inflatable SUP
shop_products.desc: All-round premium inflatable paddleboard package including carbon paddle, pump, bag, and leash.

shop_products.name: Aqua Marina Carbon Guide 3-Sec Paddle
shop_products.desc: Ultra-lightweight 70% carbon shaft paddle with reinforced nylon blade. Fully adjustable length.

shop_products.name: NRS Ninja PFD Life Vest
shop_products.desc: US Coast Guard approved Type III low-profile safety vest. Flexible foam panels for active paddling.

shop_products.name: Torq Epoxy Longboard 8'0"
shop_products.desc: Excellent condition epoxy surfboard. Perfect for beginners and longboarders looking to catch small-medium waves.

shop_products.name: Ocean Pack Waterproof Dry Bag (20L)
shop_products.desc: Heavy-duty 500D PVC roll-top waterproof bag. Keeps your phone, camera, and clothes safe and dry.

shop_ui.warranty_desc: We stand behind all water sports products we sell. New inflatable boards come with a 2-year manufacturer warranty. Used boards are fully safety inspected, and tested on Lisi Lake/Batumi before being offered for resale. Want to upgrade? Ask about our Gear Exchange program.

services_packages.name: Sunrise & Sunset Guided SUP Tours
services_packages.desc: Paddle out with a certified guide to witness the gorgeous Georgian sunrise or sunset from the water. Includes safety briefing, boards, life vests, and digital photos.

services_packages.name: Beginner Surfing Lessons
services_packages.desc: Learn the fundamentals of catching waves! Our instructors cover paddling technique, pop-up mechanics, board control, and wave etiquette in a safe environment.

services_packages.name: Corporate Watersports Events & Teambuildings
services_packages.desc: Build team spirit with exciting water sports relays, paddleboard yoga sessions, and board races! Suitable for all age groups and experience levels.
inclusions: Fun races, SUP polo, and relays

contact_page.form_subtitle: Have questions about custom SUP sales or group events? Leave your contact info and our team will reply shortly.
contact_page.subject: Subject
contact_page.map_desc: Our rental containers and surf schools are located right on the water line for instant pickup.

promo.kit_includes_desc: We believe in seamless pleasure. Our daily package gives you a complete gear bundle to get on the water instantly with zero friction:
promo.video_title: Feel the Vibe, Conquer the Challenge

rental_options.title: Rental Options
rental_options.subtitle: Flexible Pricing
rental_options.desc: Pick a self-rent package that fits your plan. Complete adventure gear included.
rental_options.why_1_desc: Rent by day or 2 days. No fixed tour times. Start whenever you're ready.
rental_options.why_2_desc: Paddle where you want. Sioni, Zhinvali, Algeti — take your board anywhere.
rental_options.why_3_desc: Self-serve means lower costs. More time on water for less money.
rental_options.why_4_desc: Explore at your pace. No guide schedule. Pure adventure.
rental_options.why_5_desc: Rent multiple boards. Families, friends, team trips.
rental_options.why_6_desc: Board, paddle, life jacket, leash, phone case, electric pump, fin, carry bag — everything included.
